Alternative Titles

Synonyms: Re: Life in a different world from zero, ReZero
Japanese: Re:ゼロから始める異世界生活
English: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-

Information

Type: TV
Episodes: 25
Status: Finished Airing
Aired: Apr 4, 2016 to Sep 19, 2016
Premiered: Spring 2016
Broadcast: Mondays at 01:05 (JST)
Producers: Frontier Works, Kadokawa
Licensors: Crunchyroll
Studios: White Fox
Source: Light novel
Genres: Drama, Fantasy, Suspense
Themes: Isekai, Psychological, Time Travel

Synopsis

When Subaru Natsuki leaves the convenience store, the last thing he expects is to be wrenched from his everyday life and dropped into a fantasy world.

Unaware of the involuted mysteries of his new home, Subaru sets off to help return a lost insignia.

Background

Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu was adapted from the light novels published by Media Factory.

Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu

Opening Theme

Spotify Apple Music
Amazon Music Youtube Music
1: "Redo" by Konomi Suzuki (eps 2-11)
2: "Paradisus-Paradoxum" by MYTH & ROID (eps 14-24)

Ending Theme

1: "STYX HELIX" by MYTH & ROID (eps 3, 5-11)
2: "Stay Alive" by Rie Takahashi (eps 12-16, 18-19, 21)
